name: The Back Nine Golf | Atlanta - West Midtown
about: The Back Nine Golf West Midtown is a premier golf simulation venue located in Atlanta, Georgia. The facility offers indoor golf experiences with multiple bays, likely featuring advanced technology for realistic play. Pricing is typically structured per bay hour or per person hour, catering to both individual golfers and groups. It is best suited for casual play, date nights, and social gatherings due to its likely bar and food offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced golf simulator technology for realistic play
Convenient urban location in West Midtown Atlanta
Food and drink options available for a complete experience
Suitable for both practice and social events
Likely offers private rooms for group bookings

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with cocktails and beers

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are available for rent at the venue, but you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on simulator wait times and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf West Midtown is primarily an adult-oriented venue and not designed for children.
